goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'belgian' food and should be in the 'same price range as the hotel'.
The restaurant should be in the 'north'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '14:15' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the cheap price range
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve belgian food and should be in the same price range as the hotel
The restaurant should be in the north
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
